diagrams.title: Network Types by Coverage Area
diagrams.description: Shows concentric circles representing different network types from smallest (PAN) to largest (WAN)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the hierarchical relationship and scale differences between network types

diagrams.title: Speed vs Coverage Trade-off
diagrams.description: Inverted triangle diagram showing inverse relationship between network speed and coverage area
elements: Top of triangle (LAN): High speed label
Arrow showing coverage increasing as speed decreases
diagrams.purpose: Understand the trade-off between speed and geographic coverage in network design

diagrams.title: Typical LAN Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows components of a typical LAN including server, workstations, switch, router, and printer
diagrams.purpose: Learn basic LAN components and their connections

diagrams.title: WAN Connectivity Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how multiple LANs connect through WAN across different cities
diagrams.purpose: Understand how WAN connects geographically dispersed networks
